spec_match.rationale: WebGPU immediates API is still pending full spec/WGSL address space integration in current browsers. The demo implements a clear uniform-buffer fallback while detailing exactly what setImmediateData replacement looks like.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive, offering red/green/blue/alpha range sliders, randomisation, color-cycling loops, and a live WebGPU-driven canvas render.

edge_cases.rationale: Flawlessly falls back to standard Canvas 2D when WebGPU is absent, and safely manages active loop/sliders interaction state.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

design_system.rationale: Conforms to design system styling rules and sets both text color and background together on button overrides.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5199437611794432) to the 'see also' section.
